UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff McCormack Baron Ragan Management Services,Inc. is present. Represented by Breda Prerez.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Blanca Alvarado, Merceds Cortez and Doris Cortez-Serrano all present.
Attorney Phillip Neiman representing the defendant Merceds Cortz through limited scope.
Attorney Josephine L. Alioto representing the defendants Blanca Alvarado and Doris Cortez-Serrano.

The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Aug -27-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
